$comment: Machine-readable sidecar of disambiguation-glossary.md. The .md is SSOT for meaning; disambiguation-literals.txt is SSOT for exact spelling. Keep all three in sync.
author: claude-code
meta_rule: A name was reused, renamed, or split across systems and the old meaning was never retired. When a glossary term is load-bearing, resolve it against the freshest SSOT (SESSION-CONTEXT.md / vault CLAUDE.md), state the interpretation in the first line of response, and proceed. Ask only when senses are 50/50 or guessing wrong is asymmetric and expensive.

meanings.sense: GPT-5.4 / 5.5 / Gemini 2.5 are hallucinations/aspirational. Live stack is Gemini 1.5 and Claude 3.5.

terms.resolution: Prune stale model claims. Current PT runtime is gemini-1.5-flash. Do not attempt to route to non-existent models.

meanings.sense: Olivier (Soul) - the underlying OtterBot creature persona.
Neo/PT (Masks) - the runtime roles (Orchestrator/Lead Engineer).

terms.resolution: Olivier is 'who I am'; Neo/PT is 'what I do'. Resolve based on tool surface (CLI=PT, Discord=Neo).

meanings.sense: Gemini CLI runtime — dissent agent 'Pete Trump'
Physical therapy with Ryan Fraley, DPT
Repo make targets pt-validate / pt-test-sync

terms.resolution: Resolve from context; state chosen sense in first line. Prefer surface name 'Neo' for the runtime sense.

meanings.sense: Open Brain — cross-AI thought memory bus, Supabase pgvector, MCP 'open-brain'. NOT a vault search engine.

terms.resolution: Use for thought/insight capture. If the operation is a vault search, flag the mismatch — that is OBn or Khoj, not OB1.

meanings.sense: Obsidian Brain — semantic vault search index, ChromaDB v2, Ollama embeddings, read-only projection of the vault.
meanings.cue: semantic search, vault index, find notes

terms.resolution: Use for broad semantic vault search. Distinct from OB1 (thought bus) and Khoj (interactive CLI surface).

meanings.sense: Local self-hosted CLI/MCP vault-expert surface with curated context + preset agents. Reactivated 2026-05-11 at localhost:42110.

terms.resolution: Live again as of 2026-05-11. knowledge-graph.jsonl historically claimed it was retired 2026-04-11 — that is stale; verify tool status against SESSION-CONTEXT.md.

meanings.sense: Hermes (Nous Research runtime) <-> Wings (Discord surface, CC deployment lane)
PT (Gemini CLI runtime) <-> Neo (Discord surface, dissent/overseer)
OLIVIER_MBP (OpenClaw runtime) <-> Zoe (Discord surface, browser automation)

terms.resolution: Before any dispatch, name the full runtime<->surface tuple back to Jack. Latest-modified identity-mapping file wins. Do NOT trust knowledge-graph.jsonl for fleet topology.

meanings.sense: Gemini Deep Research — a 5-15 min paid research run
MCP profile named 'research'

terms.resolution: EXCEPTION: ask first. For bare 'research X', ask 'Gemini Deep Research, web search, or vault lookup?' before spending the expensive path.

meanings.sense: docs/plans/ — strategic cross-session plans
efforts/current/ — active bandwidth-allocated work hubs
claude/tasks/active/ — atomic v2 task-queue items
tasks/{personal,transition,job-search,portfolio}/ — personal Obsidian task lists

terms.resolution: State where you are filing it. Before quoting a work-state dashboard, check its 'updated:' frontmatter vs body 'Last refreshed' vs git log; flag drift instead of quoting stale state.

meanings.sense: The Obsidian vault at /Users/jack.reis/Documents/=notes; leading '=' is zsh parameter-expansion

terms.resolution: In tool calls use the fully-qualified absolute path (no escaping needed). Escape as ~/Documents/\=notes only in shell commands handed to Jack.

meanings.sense: Workflow-automation tool; the fleet's unified bus for webhook ingress and declarative routing
NOT the 'n'/'cn' shell aliases (Claude Code) — they only share a prefix

terms.resolution: 'n8n' always means the workflow engine, never a Claude Code session. Numeronym for 'nodemation'.

skill_collisions.resolution: ledger-lifecycle is the current unified entry. session-lifecycle is superseded — do not invoke.
Public link -> vault-to-share. Editable review triad -> vault-to-gdrive-set. PDF only -> vault-to-pdf.
Date math -> dashboard-refresh. Push out to Drive -> gdrive-sync. Pull daily data into dashboard -> daily-metrics-sync.
